## TIER 1 — Real Backend, No Consumer (One Wire Away)

These have a complete, tested backend implementation. The only missing piece is a route registration, a corrected endpoint string, or a new ~60–80 line consumer file.

### T1-1: catalog/search
- **Backend:** `api/v1/catalog.py:218-259` — Voyage + Pinecone, covered by `tests/api/test_catalog_endpoint.py`
- **Consumer gap:** Zero hits for `v1/catalog` in `frontend/` (excluding the CSV-write proxy)
- **Wire:** One typed fetch to `GET /api/v1/catalog/search?q=&top_k=` from `frontend/app/products/page.tsx` or a new `/app/search/page.tsx`; no backend changes

### T1-2: catalog/answer (RAG Q&A, 1h TTL cache)
- **Backend:** `api/v1/catalog.py:501-612` — `answer_question` + streaming; LRU cache at line 82
- **Consumer gap:** Zero hits for `/answer` in `frontend/` and `mcp_tools/`
- **Wire:** New `mcp_tools/tools/catalog_qa.py` with `devskyy_catalog_answer` tool; register in `mcp_tools/__init__.py`

### T1-3: catalog/products/{sku}/similar
- **Backend:** `api/v1/catalog.py:413-457` — real `find_similar_by_sku` via `orchestration/catalog_retriever.py:290`
- **Consumer gap:** Zero hits for `/similar` in `frontend/`
- **Wire:** `frontend/app/api/catalog/[sku]/similar/route.ts` + `SimilarProducts` component

### T1-4: catalog/collections/{slug}/featured
- **Backend:** `api/v1/catalog.py:262-297` — real `retriever.retrieve_by_collection`
- **Consumer gap:** Zero hits for `collections` + `featured` in `frontend/`
- **Wire:** Next.js proxy route + update `catalog-server.ts::getEnrichedCollection`

### T1-5: descriptions — image-to-description
- **Backend:** `api/v1/descriptions.py:91-213` — real `pipeline.generate_description` / `extract_features`
- **Consumer gap:** Zero hits in `frontend/` and `mcp_tools/tools/` for route paths

### T1-6: claude-sdk/research
- **Backend:** `api/v1/claude_sdk.py:32-65` — real `ResearchAgent` delegation with `ImportError` guard
- **Consumer gap:** Zero hits for `claude-sdk` in `frontend/`; MCP tool exists but frontend surface missing

### T1-7: Marketing campaign — one-character route fix
- **Backend:** `api/v1/marketing.py:113` — route is `POST /marketing/campaigns`
- **Consumer gap:** `mcp_tools/tools/marketing.py:108` calls `"marketing/campaign"` (missing `s`)
- **Wire:** Change `"marketing/campaign"` → `"marketing/campaigns"` at `marketing.py:108`

### T1-8: ML prediction — route mismatch
- **Backend:** `api/v1/ml.py:262` — `POST /ml/predict` with `model_type` in body
- **Consumer gap:** `mcp_tools/tools/ml.py:100` calls `f"ml/predict/{params.model_type.value}"` (route doesn't exist)
- **Wire:** Flatten to `endpoint="ml/predict"`, add `model_type=params.model_type.value` to data dict

### T1-9: Orchestration workflow — route mismatch
- **Backend:** `api/v1/orchestration.py:81` — route is `/orchestration/workflows`
- **Consumer gap:** `mcp_tools/tools/advanced.py:127` calls `"workflows/execute"` (no such route in `api/`)
- **Wire:** Change `"workflows/execute"` → `"orchestration/workflows"` at `advanced.py:127`

### T1-10: Feature Flags — not mounted
- **Backend:** `api/v1/feature_flags.py:42-119` — real CRUD; router prefix `"/api/v1/flags"`

### T1-11: WordPress Content Sync — not mounted

### T2-5: Journey Analytics baseline data

- **Frontend mock:** `frontend/app/admin/journey-analytics/page.tsx:83-154,263-274` — static fixture data

Note: `immersive.js:240` already marks this as the intended target.

## TIER 3 — Stub Needing Real Backend Wire First

These capabilities have routing infrastructure and response models in place, but the handler body returns hardcoded fixtures or a `# TODO`. The MCP/frontend consumer is a follow-on.

**STATUS: T3-1 through T3-4 are VERIFIED-DONE — see `tasks/todo.md:9-24` (all `[x]`, main-thread re-verified).**

### T3-1: code/scan — stub body + wrong MCP route
- **Backend stub:** `api/v1/code.py:170-194` — hardcoded `ScanIssue` list for `example.py`
- **MCP wrong route:** `mcp_tools/tools/infrastructure.py:163` calls `"scanner/scan"` (no such route)
- **Wire:** (1) Fix route in `infrastructure.py:163` → `"code/scan"`; (2) Replace TODO body with `SecurityMonitoringAgent(Path(request.path)).scan_all_vulnerabilities()` from `security/vulnerability_scanner.py`, mapping `SecurityScanResult`/`Vulnerability` to `ScanIssue`

### T3-2: commerce/products/bulk — stub body + wrong MCP endpoint map
- **Backend stub:** `api/v1/commerce.py:156-182,308-340` — mock loops with hardcoded 10% failure
- **MCP wrong routes:** `mcp_tools/tools/ecommerce.py:132-138` — endpoint_map pointing to `products/create|update|delete|list|optimize` (none exist in `api/`)
- **Wire:** Fix endpoint_map to `"commerce/products/bulk"`; replace mock loops with `CommerceAgent` calls following the `optimize` initialization pattern at `commerce.py:467`

### T3-3: 3D model generation text-to-3D + image-to-3D
- **Backend stub:** `api/v1/media.py:173-196,255-278` — hardcoded `ThreeDAssetMetadata` and fake URLs; `TODO: Integrate with agents/tripo_agent.py` at line 173
- **MCP wrong routes:** `mcp_tools/tools/threed.py:149` calls `"3d/generate-from-description"`, line 203 calls `"3d/generate-from-image"` (neither exists; real routes are `media/3d/generate/text` and `media/3d/generate/image`)
- **Wire:** (1) Replace stub bodies in `media.py` with `TripoAgent` delegation; (2) fix endpoint strings in `threed.py:149,203`

### T3-4: WordPress Theme Deploy — stub body
- **Backend stub:** `api/v1/wordpress_theme.py:46-56` — `success=False` hardcoded; `# TODO` comment
- **Consumer gap:** Zero hits in `frontend/` for `theme/deploy`
- **Wire:** Replace stub with `subprocess.run(["bash", str(Path(__file__).parents[2] / "scripts/deploy-theme.sh")], check=True, env={**os.environ, "DEPLOY_ENV": request.environment, "BACKUP_FIRST": "1" if request.backup_first else "0"})`. Note: this is a production-touching action — STOP-AND-SHOW applies.

- **Backend partial:** `api/v1/approval.py:333,355,373,392` — calls `sync.is_configured`, `sync.sync_item`, `sync.sync_approved_items`, `sync.skipped` — all absent from `sync/wordpress_media_approval_sync.py`

## Dedup Notes

- **AI enhancement duplicate** (`api/v1/ai_image_enhancement.py`) is subsumed by the `ai_enhancement.py` gap (T3-6). Delete the dead file as part of the same PR that mounts the real router.
- **Training Status** (T2-2) and **Training Export to HF** (T1-14) are separate concerns in the same file (`api/v1/training_status.py`) but have independent consumers — do not conflate.
- **WordPress Content Sync** (T1-11) and **WooCommerce Product Sync** (T1-13) are different routers (`wordpress.py` vs `wordpress_integration.py`) with a shared symptom: `worker.ts:77` points at the wrong URL. Fix both in one PR.
- **Marketing campaign** (T1-7), **ML prediction** (T1-8), and **orchestration workflow** (T1-9) are all single-line endpoint string fixes in MCP tool files — batch these into one PR.
